text:
## Plan-Year Changes

Deductibles, out-of-pocket maximums, and accumulator balances (deductible paid, OOP paid) reset to zero at the start of each new plan year (January 1), regardless of how much was accrued in the prior plan year. Mid-year plan tier changes (e.g. Bronze to Gold) require a new deductible period; amounts accrued under the prior tier do not carry over to the new tier.
